examples: Smee had pleasant names for everything, and his cutlass was Johnny Corkscrew, because he wiggled it in the wound.
There was fierce struggle, in which the cutlass was torn from the pirate's grasp.
I was neither at the hot gates, nor fought in the warm rain, nor knee deep in the salt marsh, heaving a cutlass, bitten by flies, fought.
Armed with his new driver's license, Benioff took off in his grandmother's Oldsmobile Cutlass to meet his new boss.
Put on your eye patch, sharpen your cutlass and wake up your parrot.
